examples: It's his idea of a joke, I suppose, the scallywag.
Whereupon Sir Tarzan, bushman and scallywag no longer, augustly inaugurates his more empyreanavocations.
"The little scallywag, " said the headmaster. "I'll bet it was him all the time."
Mr Bishop named his party "Lord Biro Versus the Scallywag Tories", and came eighth out of 10 candidates.
